objective: Extract exact computable families from positive-geometry / amplitudes / cosmological-geometry papers, compare surviving structure across families, and distinguish realization classes before substrate or engineering commitment.

status_tags.SOURCE_BACKED: Tied to uploaded papers, exact-work handoff, or Lean authority files.
status_tags.THREAD_SUPPORTED: Established by repeated thread comparison but not yet formalized as theorem-level source-bound proof.
status_tags.GENERATED: Generated construction or bridge language; not source authority.
status_tags.OPEN: Unresolved; must not be used as an assumption.
status_tags.DEFICIT: Known missing layer required before closure.

rows.name: Unit codimension descent
rows.predicate: Boundary descent proceeds by unit codimension moves.
rows.verdict: Shared lower layer across associahedron, cosmohedron, and amplituhedron m=1; not a class discriminator by itself.

rows.name: Local move multiplicity
rows.predicate: Family has more than one primitive immediate-face/local cover move.
rows.verdict: Cosmohedron has at least delete_nonminimal and collapse_children; associahedron and m=1 amplituhedron each have one basic descent primitive in current baseline.

rows.name: Nested-history / linear-extension burden
rows.predicate: Objects/faces carry nested-history or linear-extension data beyond ordinary deletion descent.
rows.verdict: Appears cosmohedron-specific in current finite baseline.
missing: source-bound formal check across broader families

rows.name: Exact finite positive-Grassmannian top-cell closure
rows.predicate: Safe finite top-cell closure consists only of A, D4, E6.
rows.verdict: Non-negotiable authority state; do not extend D_n beyond D4 as exact.

rows.name: Top-interaction coefficient representatives
rows.predicate: Explicit representatives are carried: [mu_Gr+(2,n)] = n u_{n-4}; [mu_Gr+(3,6)] = 4 u_3 Omega_D; [mu_Gr+(3,7)] = u_5(7 omega_A + 14 omega_D).
rows.verdict: Must remain explicit; not compressed into vague coefficient language.

rows.name: Support-node orbit law
rows.predicate: Paired support coefficient h+2; fixed support coefficient (h+2)/2.
rows.verdict: Safe inside solved exact branch only.

rows.name: Parabolic residue recursion
rows.predicate: Fully supporting parabolic facets carry lower top-interaction class as residue: Res_Y(mu_Gamma)=±mu_Gamma'.
rows.verdict: Safe recursive descent through solved branch only.

rows.name: Root-bundle / local transport layer
rows.predicate: Intrinsic residue-family bundle and local A2 quarter-turn transport law.
rows.verdict: Candidate faithful local transport layer; does not imply literal substrate realization.

rows.name: Grouped carriers
rows.predicate: Family admits grouped carriers / grouped subsets supporting factorization or compatibility data.
rows.verdict: Shared by graph-associahedral/cosmological and cosmohedral side; not enough to distinguish R2/R3.
missing: full matrix across A, M1, S

rows.name: Grouped parameters / weights
rows.predicate: Family has grouped parameters such as delta_P or grouped weights.
rows.verdict: Shared lower layer between graph-associahedral vicinity and cosmohedral construction.
missing: exact grouped parameter dictionary per family

rows.name: Grouped factorization
rows.predicate: Factorization is expressible at grouped-carrier/grouped-parameter level.
rows.verdict: Shared lower layer; does not separate R2/R3.

rows.name: Overlap / submodular inequality law
rows.predicate: Grouped parameters obey overlap/submodular inequalities like delta_P + delta_P' <= delta_union + delta_intersection.
rows.verdict: Shared by generalized-permutahedron / graph-associahedron side and cosmohedron-related grouped laws; not the final R2/R3 discriminator.

rows.name: Equality-layer status
rows.predicate: Equality layer typed as absent / generic inequality / degenerate equality / intrinsic equality.
rows.verdict: Current strongest R2/R3 discriminator: graph-associahedral vicinity reaches equalities by specialization/degeneration; cosmohedron requires many equalities intrinsically.

rows.name: Missing grouped-carrier equation / full class-matrix deficit
rows.predicate: The exact equation layer and class matrix must be source-bound and formalized across all surviving rows/classes.
rows.verdict: Known gap; not solved. Complete R1-R14 × class matrix, source bindings, proof/check obligations, and unresolved discriminators remain required.

current_solved_comparisons.summary: GAssoc equalities appear by special saturation/degeneration; C equalities are intrinsic to grouped compatibility/nontransversal gluing. Therefore distinct but ordered, with C as equality-saturated specialization/refinement of GAssoc-type regime.

global_deficits: Previous repo patch only uploaded R2/R3; this ledger uploads R1-R14 continuity state.
Rows R9-R13 need full cross-family matrix beyond GAssoc/C.
No substrate commitment has been made.
